visa_type_detail.name: Residence permit for EU/EEA citizens
visa_type_detail.description: EU/EEA citizens have the right to work, run their own business, study or live in Sweden without a residence permit. This right is known as right of residence. They can stay for up to three months without special requirements. For stays longer than three months, they need to meet the requirements for right of residence by either working, running their own business, studying or having sufficient funds.
visa_type_detail.duration: More than three months (if requirements for right of residence are met)

visa_type_detail.name: Residence permit for family members of non-EU/EEA citizens
visa_type_detail.description: If your family member is a citizen of a non-EU/EEA country and plans to be in Sweden for longer than three months, they need to apply for a residence card.
visa_type_detail.eligibility: Family members of a person with right of residence in Sweden, who are citizens of a non-EU/EEA country.
visa_type_detail.related_to: Live with a partner, child, or other relative

essential_apps.description: The primary digital identity and authentication service in Sweden, used for banking, government services, and more.
